AD_VAL_RULE.NAME: UOM - WorkRequirement
AD_VAL_RULE.CODE: C_Uom.C_Uom_ID in (select aum.C_Uom_ID from M_Production pt left join M_ProductionPlan ofpt on ofpt.M_Production_id = pt.M_Production_id left join MA_Wrphase fof on fof.MA_Wrphase_id = ofpt.MA_Wrphase_id left join MA_WorkRequirement odf on odf.MA_WorkRequirement_ID = fof.MA_WorkRequirement_ID left join M_ProductionLine mpln on mpln.M_ProductionPlan_ID = ofpt.M_ProductionPlan_ID left join M_Product mp on mp.M_Product_id = mpln.M_Product_id left join M_Product_AUM aum on aum.M_Product_id = mp.M_Product_id where odf.MA_WorkRequirement_id = @MA_WorkRequirement_id@ AND Productiontype = '+')

AD_VAL_RULE.NAME: Production of WorkRequirement
AD_VAL_RULE.CODE: M_Production.M_Production_id in (select pt.M_Production_Id from M_Production pt left join M_ProductionPlan ofpt on ofpt.M_Production_id = pt.M_Production_id left join MA_Wrphase fof on fof.MA_Wrphase_id = ofpt.MA_Wrphase_id left join MA_WorkRequirement odf on odf.MA_WorkRequirement_ID = fof.MA_WorkRequirement_ID where odf.MA_WorkRequirement_ID = @MA_WorkRequirement_id@)
